title: Lil guys [Cobblemon]
description: An unofficial cobblemon add-on that adds in lil guys. Has Dedenne, Snubbull, G-Ponyta.
body:
This is an Add-On for Cobblemon.

The current official version of the mod is missing a few skrunkly little meow meows. This add-on adds a few more pokemon. Install datapack as a datapack and resourcepack to Cobblemon.

Spawning!

Dedenne-Spawns rarely in villages and more frequently next to a lightning rod in a storm.

Galarian Ponyta-Spawns uncommonly at grasslands in the night, and dark oak forests. Rapidash has similar spawns but should be less frequent.

Snubbul and Granbull -Spawns commonly in non-badlands villages, uncommon in grasslands during the day, and commonly in dark oak forests.

Cottonnee and Whimsicott -Spawns are not yet set.

-=Installation=-

Put lilguy_addon[version_#] into your resourcepacks folder and your datapacks folder.

Extras!

Galarian Rapidash and Ponyta use edited models from the original cobblemon, as well as an edited version of Dubwool's animation. Make sure to enable the resource pack. :] ...thank you to the Cobblemon Discord server for your help and support!
